title: FRANCE enforcement action against FRANCE TRAVAIL (5,000,000)
summary: Insufficient technical and organisational measures to ensure information security The French DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 5,000,000 on FRANCE TRAVAIL. The controller suffered a successful cyber attack due to insufficient technical and organisational measures, resulting in the leak of personal and special category data concerning 38,820,8...
